records.ety: [OF. relumer (cf. F. rallumer), L. reluminare; pref. re- re- + luminare to light. Cf. Reillume.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Relumed (-l?md"); p. pr. & vb. n. Reluming.]

quotes: Relumed her ancient light, not kindled new.
I know not where is that Promethean heat That can thy light relume.
